---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Mahshad Sarikhani"
toc: false
page-layout: full
grid:
  body-width: 1000px
  margin-width: 0px
listing:
  - id: hero-notes
    contents: 
      - "notes/**/*.qmd"
      - "!notes/index.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: assets/templates/hero-note.ejs
    max-items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, maturity, path, description]
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

::: {.hero-section}

::: {.hero-left}
[A personal site, periodically updated]{.eyebrow}

[Mahshad *Sarikhani*]{.hero-name}

[MD · imaging AI researcher · finding what hides in medical data]{.hero-tagline}

::: {.hero-bio}
A doctor who codes. 
I work on quantitative MRI in inflammatory bowel disease, building models that turn imaging into something measurable.
:::

::: {.hero-chips}
[quantitative MRI]{.chip .chip-mint}
[2× ESGAR 2026]{.chip .chip-navy}
[agentic pipelines]{.chip .chip-rose}
[IBD imaging]{.chip .chip-mint}
[UK global talent]{.chip .chip-navy}
[Bayesian modeling]{.chip .chip-rose}
:::

:::

::: {.hero-notes}
::: {.notes-label}
[recent notes]{} [[all →](notes/index.qmd)]{}
:::

::: {#hero-notes}
:::
:::

:::

## Selected *work*

::: {.proof-grid}

<!-- Row 1: wide anchor + narrow project -->
::: {.proof-card .proof-card--wide .proof-card--anchor}
::: {.card-label}
ESGAR 2026 · Oral Presentation
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Association of Colonic Motility on MRE with Endoscopic Activity and Chronic Structural Damage in UC](research/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
GIQuant-derived displacement metrics mapped against Mayo Endoscopic Subscores in a UC cohort. In collaboration with Motilent and Prof. Jean-Frédéric Colombel (Mount Sinai).
:::
::: {.card-stat}
**June 2026** · Montpellier
:::
:::

::: {.proof-stack}

::: {.proof-card .proof-card--narrow}
::: {.card-label}
In Progress
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Agentic MRE Pipeline](projects/mre-pipeline/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
Using LLMs to extract structured data from free-text radiology reports.
:::
:::

::: {.proof-card .proof-card--narrow}
::: {.card-label}
Live Tool
:::
::: {.card-title}
[IBD Imaging Digest](projects/ibd-digest/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
A daily literature pipeline that fetches, ranks, and tiers new IBD imaging papers into a personal Obsidian digest.
:::
:::

:::

<!-- Row 2: narrow project + wide anchor -->
::: {.proof-card .proof-card--quote .proof-card--narrow}
::: {.card-label}
On obsession
:::
::: {.quote-text}
Creation is about edited obsession. It is knowing what to keep and, more importantly, what to set on fire.
:::
::: {.quote-author}
Jonathan Anderson
:::
:::


::: {.proof-card .proof-card--wide .proof-card--anchor}
::: {.card-label}
ESGAR 2026 · Oral Presentation
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Non-invasive Triage of Ulcerative Colitis Activity: A Bayesian Risk Stratification Model Integrating MRE and Fecal Calprotectin](research/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
A multilevel Bayesian model integrating MR enterography features and fecal calprotectin for non-invasive triage of UC disease activity.
:::
::: {.card-stat}
**June 2026** · Montpellier
:::
:::

<!-- Row 3: full-width "now" closer -->
::: {.proof-card .proof-card--full .proof-card--now}
::: {.card-label}
What's on my mind
:::
::: {.now-text}
Two oral presentations at ESGAR 2026 in three weeks. Finishing the motility manuscript for submission. Reading *Thinking, Fast and Slow* and working through PyMC documentation.
:::
::: {.now-date}
Updated May 2026
:::
:::

:::

---

::: {style="text-align: center; margin: 2rem 0; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #4a9a88; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;"}
[About](about/index.qmd) · [Research](research/index.qmd) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iKhNW9AAAAAJ) · [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa)
:::
